\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4467 introduces Entry Spectral Gap Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\Delta_T = \nabla^\mu \nabla_\mu + V_{\text{TZP}}(x) \equiv \Box + \frac{\lambda}{\|x - x_{\text{TZP}}\|^2} \cdot \chi_T$$
